issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path scenarios.

scenarios.name: orders-list-with-sort-and-filter
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses `useTable` from `@refinedev/antd` with `sorters.initial`, `filters.permanent`, and `pagination.pageSize`, plus `useSelect` for the status dropdown, and registers `orders` in the `resources` array on `<Refine>`; baseline scaffolds an antd Table manually with useState/useEffect and no Refine resource definition.

scenarios.name: custom-rest-data-provider
scenarios.rationale: Treatment implements the `DataProvider` interface with the documented `getList`/`getOne`/`create`/`update`/`deleteOne`/`getApiUrl` signatures (including the `{data, total}` return shape and `pagination`/`sorters`/`filters` args); baseline writes an ad-hoc fetch wrapper that doesn't conform to Refine's DataProvider contract.
